title: Help Text
text: Help Text A Help Text is a legacy Development Object that defines a block of text that is displayed in an application window to provide help about the application. They are unlikely to be used in modern applications. Help texts must have a unique name; they cannot use the same name as a message. They can be accessed with the help ProcScript statement and the $text ProcScript function. New and updated help texts are automatically compiled when you save them. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: msg Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: MessageName @ Library @ Language .msg lib: LibraryName.Language :msg: MessageName Specialization Help Text specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a message library as parent. It has properties, but no code containers or other development objects. Unlike Message objects, it has window dimensions. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
